remember: Students will be able to recall the format and structure of a notice.
Students will be able to remember the key elements of a notice, such as the heading, content, and signature.
Students will be able to recall the purpose and function of a notice in everyday life.
understand: Students will be able to understand the importance of a notice in conveying information to a large audience.
Students will be able to comprehend the role of language in creating an effective notice.
Students will be able to analyze the tone and style of a notice to determine its purpose.
apply: Students will be able to write a notice on a given topic, using the correct format and structure.
Students will be able to include all the essential elements of a notice in their writing.
Students will be able to use language effectively to convey the message of the notice.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the language and tone used in a notice to determine its effectiveness.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different types of notices and their purposes.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of a notice on its target audience.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective, students will be able to understand the concept of notice writing and its importance in everyday life.
Students will be able to identify the key elements of a notice and write a notice on a given topic.
Students will be able to understand the role of language in creating an effective notice.
board_exam_objectives: Identify the format and structure of a notice.
Write a notice on a given topic, using the correct format and structure.
Use language effectively to convey the message of the notice.
Evaluate the impact of a notice on its target audience.
